syntax = "proto3";
package api.user.v1;
option go_package = "test/api/user/v1;v1";
option java_multiple_files = true;
option java_package = "api.user.v1";
service UserService {
	rpc Create (CreateUserRequest) returns (CreateUserReply);
	rpc Update (UpdateUserRequest) returns (UpdateUserReply);
	rpc Patch (PatchUserRequest) returns (PatchUserReply);
	rpc DestroyBy (DestroyUserByRequest) returns (DestroyUserByReply);
	rpc FindBy (FindUserByRequest) returns (FindUserByReply);
	rpc ExistBy (ExistUserByRequest) returns (ExistUserByReply);
	rpc List (ListUserRequest) returns (ListUserReply);
}

message User {
	int64 id = 2;
	string name = 3;
	int32 age = 4;
}
message CreateUserRequest {
	string name = 2;
	int32 age = 3;
}
message CreateUserReply {
	User datum = 1;
}
message UpdateUserRequest {
	int64 id = 1;
	string name = 2;
	int32 age = 3;
}
message UpdateUserReply {
	User datum = 1;
}
message PatchUserRequest {
	int64 id = 1;
	optional string name = 2;
	optional int32 age = 3;
}
message PatchUserReply {
	User datum = 1;
}

message DestroyUserByRequest {
	UserParam param = 1;
}
message DestroyUserByReply {
	int32 count = 1;
}
message FindUserByRequest {
	UserParam param = 1;
}
message FindUserByReply {
	User datum = 1;
}
message ExistUserByRequest {
	UserParam param = 1;
}
message ExistUserByReply {
	bool exist = 1;
}
message UserParam {
	optional int64 idEq = 1;
	repeated int64 idIn = 2;
	optional string nameCont = 3;
	optional int32 ageGTE = 4;
	optional int32 ageLTE = 5;
}
message ListUserRequest {
	uint32 page = 1;
	uint32 pageSize = 2;
	UserParam param = 3;
	string orderBy = 4;
}
message ListUserReply {
	repeated User list = 1;
	uint32 count = 2;
}
